summary: Added tech stack inference service, UX pattern library extension point, section type expansion (16 new types), and fixed claude-agent provider bug.
test_results: 11 tech_stack tests pass, 8 execution_mode tests pass, 6 parse_agent tests pass
diff: See git diff HEAD for full diff (1597 lines). Key changes: new tech_stack_service.rs (infer_tech_stack from manifests), new patterns/ module (UxPattern types + resolver), ClaudeAgent provider variant in cli_mapper.rs + agent.rs, 16 new SectionType variants in spec_rules.rs
